description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a predominantly black metal body and a wooden pistol grip. The receiver is detailed with various mechanical components, including a prominent cylindrical section and multiple mounting rails. The barrel is short and robust, with a thick profile and a visible muzzle device at the front. The rifle is equipped with iron sights and several adjustment knobs and levers, suggesting modularity and customization. The wooden grip contrasts with the otherwise matte black finish, adding a classic touch to the modern build. The overall construction appears solid and functional, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is key.
description: A compact, black tactical rifle with a wooden pistol grip, short barrel, and detailed mechanical components. It features iron sights and a robust, modular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick barrel, muzzle device, and symmetrical arrangement of the rifle's body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden pistol grip, receiver details, and iron sights along the top rail.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the mechanical components, mounting rails, and the wooden grip.
